description: Refactor baro-tui crate: remove dead code, split large files, DRY up duplicates

userStories.description: Remove the parallelism_history field from App struct in app.rs (lines 129, 166) and its tracking code in main.rs (lines 258-263). The sparkline UI was removed but the tracking remained. Also check for and remove any unused imports. Run cargo build after each deletion to confirm no breakage.
userStories.title: Remove dead code from app.rs and main.rs

userStories.description: Create crates/baro-tui/src/dag.rs containing the DagLevel struct and build_dag() function (executor.rs lines 54-131). Make DagLevel and build_dag pub(crate). Update executor.rs to import from dag.rs via 'use crate::dag::{DagLevel, build_dag}'. Add 'mod dag;' to main.rs. Ensure cargo build passes with zero warnings.
userStories.title: Extract dag.rs from executor.rs

userStories.description: Create crates/baro-tui/src/git.rs containing: (1) A new get_current_branch(cwd: &Path) async helper that runs 'git branch --show-current' and returns Result<String, String>. (2) Move get_git_file_stats() (executor.rs lines 251-273). (3) Move update_prd_story() (executor.rs lines 277-298). (4) Move git_push_with_retry() (executor.rs lines 302-394). Refactor git_push_with_retry and execute_story to use the new get_current_branch helper instead of inline 'git branch --show-current' calls (currently at executor.rs lines 311-318 and 427-436). Make all moved functions pub(crate). Add 'mod git;' to main.rs. Update executor.rs imports.
userStories.title: Extract git.rs from executor.rs with get_current_branch helper

userStories.description: Split the 949-line screens/execute.rs into focused sub-modules: (1) Create screens/execute_dashboard.rs with render_dashboard(), render_story_list(), story_list_item(), render_logs() (lines 237-449). (2) Create screens/execute_dag.rs with render_dag_full() (lines 454-601). (3) Create screens/execute_stats.rs with render_stats_full() (lines 605-878). (4) Create screens/execute_completion.rs with render_completion() (lines 44-163). (5) Move status_icon_color() to a shared location - keep it in screens/execute.rs and make it pub(crate) so execute_dag.rs can import it. Keep in screens/execute.rs: render(), render_header(), render_progress(), render_footer(), status_icon_color(). Update screens/mod.rs to declare the new sub-modules. Each sub-module imports status_icon_color from execute.rs as needed.
userStories.title: Split screens/execute.rs into sub-modules

userStories.description: Run cargo build and cargo clippy on the entire workspace. Verify zero warnings and zero errors. Fix any remaining unused imports or minor issues. Ensure the binary compiles correctly and all module declarations are consistent.
userStories.title: Final verification - zero warnings, zero errors
